# UTTC - United Technology & Trading Co.

> UAE's most trusted water works authority since 1976.

## About Us
UTTC is the premier engineering firm in the United Arab Emirates specializing in commercial and residential swimming pools, complex water features, desalination plants, and electromechanical services.

## Services Offered
- Commercial & Residential Pool Construction
- Intelligent Water Features
- Water Treatment & Desalination
- Pumping Stations & Networks

## Why Choose UTTC?
- ISO 9001, 14001, 45001 Certified
- Over 5,000 successful projects
- Decades of institutional knowledge handling the Middle East's harshest climates.
